# Eval Scoring Checklist

## Structural Failure Signals
- missing hard gate before risky downstream work
- contradictory agent ownership
- no durable artifact for important state
- no credible reopen path when downstream findings invalidate upstream work
- no evidence path for release or validation claims

## Practicality Signals
- too many required artifacts for the value delivered
- handoffs too vague to be actionable
- important state hidden only in prompt prose
